texas_v10_rule_basis: Preserve noindex until all critical families are verified
District-grade routing must use direct local or district-owned evidence, not generic or statewide fallback
Legacy/inventory-only evidence does not satisfy California-grade completeness

final_blockers.evidence: Reviewed Minnesota packet evidence still routes district or county education through generic statewide Minnesota special-education pages rather than county- or district-owned leaves.

The reviewed Mid-Minnesota Legal Aid site preserves a live Minnesota Disability Law Center route and phone line, but the saved first-party artifact does not preserve explicit Protection and Advocacy designation text.
Reviewed PACER Center evidence proves Minnesota statewide family support and special-education guidance scope, but the saved first-party artifact does not preserve explicit PTI designation text.
Reviewed Mid-Minnesota Legal Aid now preserves a live statewide legal-aid access route on its first-party homepage and about page.

The likely official Minnesota county/local disability routing pages under mn.gov/dhs now redirect to a Radware Bot Manager challenge instead of returning county and tribal office content to bounded low-token fetches.
